name: Horrorshow
description: The Horrorshow trades the typical Vladof fire rate for higher damage and accuracy than the Droog, with a mid-sized magazine and manageable recoil. It still hits softer than most non-Vladof sniper rifles and usually reloads slowly. Rather than true long-range sniping, it performs best at mid range, sitting between an assault rifle and a conventional sniper.
notes: It can drop randomly from any appropriate loot source.
